nav_structure_summary: PAL uses a Drupal JSON:API (node/publication?site=5) exposing all published policy publications with PAL category taxonomy. The frontend A-Z listing (/filter-az) is currently in maintenance mode; the API is the authoritative source of all 453 policy records.
